name: svd-agent-skills
description: Personal Claude Code skills for managing local projects, analyzing sessions, and handing off context between sessions.

plugins.name: manage-claude-projects
plugins.description: Inspect, audit, and clean up local Claude Code projects under ~/.claude.

plugins.name: session-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyze a Claude Code session JSONL transcript into a structured Markdown report.

plugins.name: session-handoff
plugins.description: Write and resume structured context handoffs between Claude sessions.

plugins.name: mcp-client-kit
plugins.description: Generate typed Python wrappers for any MCP server (skills: generate-mcp-wrappers, generate-mcp-runner).
